channel.title: Notes on Zymacs
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Zymacs

item.title: GIT
item.description: The following is a collection of notes I took from reading the book on Git, Progit. Its a page I am still growing. (I got enough of the book to use Git and have for long not updated the page) but it sure is a lot and I am sure you will have more than you need to become functionally proficient. I also include links to articles from Atlassian that I used for deep dives where I felt I needed more explanation. Hope this helps.
